failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    p.id AS profile_id,
    p.username,
    p.num_followers
FROM profile p
WHERE (p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'São Paulo') OR p.biography ILIKE '%São Paulo%')
  AND p.num_followers > 10000
  AND p.biography ILIKE '%restaurant%'
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
